description: Design systems, accessibility, and motion standards.

links.title: CSS Anchor Positioning
links.context: Native placement + collision fallback (Baseline 2026). Default engine for the Anchor Intent / Web Positioning.

links.title: Floating UI
links.context: Reference positioning engine (placement, flip/shift/offset middleware, autoUpdate). Bridged via the Floating UI Adapter.

links.title: Popover API
links.context: Top-layer rendering and light dismiss (Baseline 2024). Composes with anchoring; layering is orthogonal to positioning.

links.title: D3-force
links.context: Force-directed graph layout (non-deterministic) — a webgraph CustomGraphLayout adapter, never the deterministic default.

links.title: ELK (Eclipse Layout Kernel)
links.context: Layered / orthogonal graph layout — the layered-DAG family the webgraph native-first default mirrors; a CustomGraphLayout adapter.

links.title: dagre
links.context: Directed-graph layered (Sugiyama) layout — a webgraph CustomGraphLayout adapter.

links.title: Cytoscape.js
links.context: Graph rendering + analysis library — a webgraph CustomGraphRenderer adapter candidate.

links.title: Mermaid
links.context: Declarative diagram / node-link rendering — node-link prior art; accTitle/accDescr a11y the webgraph a11y axis borrows.

links.title: reaflow
links.context: React node-based diagram library — node-link diagram prior art for the webgraph renderer.
